hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.py) ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.ts|*.tsx) npx --no-install eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *learnings.json|*library.json) "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/filter-learnings.sh" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$FILE" in *.py) ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.ts|*.tsx) npx --no-install eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *learnings.json|*library.json) "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/filter-learnings.sh" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git push' && [ -f CHANGELOG.md ]; then echo '[ADD] CHANGELOG.md exists — run /add:changelog to update it before pushing.'; fi
